summary: No-claim profiler/scaling evidence for the c2/c4/c8 auto equality path. c2 remains native batch full-attention under profiler; c8 uses the non-retained per-row full-attention fallback. The c2/c4/c8 equality gate stays green, but c4/c8 are not retained-ready because the profiler confirms the fallback context kernel rather than native c-aware full-attention.

retained_claim_blockers: c4/c8 equality path uses per-row full-attention fallback and is explicitly not native c-aware decode
c8 profiler shows qwen35_full_attn_decode_context_tensor_kernel rather than native batch full-attention context kernel
projection dispatch remains blocked for retained c>N rows; this artifact is runtime/profiler evidence only

commands.profile_c2: rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv -d /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-auto-fullattn-profile-iter119-c2 -- env HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py ... --batch-size 2 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-auto-fullattn-profiled-iter119-c2.json
commands.profile_c8: rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv -d /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-auto-fullattn-profile-iter119-c8 -- env HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py ... --batch-size 8 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-auto-fullattn-profiled-iter119-c8.json
commands.active_verify: active loop verify command at clean commit e5257fc returned metric 137
commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
